name: master-jun
description: Auditable Eastern divination with Bazi-aware event readings and deterministic casting tools.

interface.shortDescription: 客观起课、命事课合参，并保留可复盘的原断。
interface.longDescription: Master Jun combines verified natal-chart context with Da Liuren, Xiao Liuren, Zhouyi, Meihua, Bazi and Zi Wei workflows. It exposes casting logic, handles fuzzy-time variants, compares multiple options consistently, and freezes consequential readings for later hit-or-miss review.
interface.defaultPrompt: 请用 Master Jun 核验信息、交代起课逻辑，并以命—事—课合参客观断事。
